rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 ) OR (3 AND (5 OR 4)) OR (6 AND 7)
rules.label: No, Error
rules.name: No_Error

Flow.description: 02/17/2026 Geetham For US#637372 01/20/2026 Muhammad for US#630863 12/29/2025 Finding 616903 12/10/2025 Geetham for US#622063 11/10/2025 Luis For US#542223 10/28/2025 Geetham For US#598035 10/22/2025 Geetham For US#598035 10/20/2025 German for US#589119 10/16/2025 Geetham For US#598012 10/08/2025 Geetham for US#591976 10/02/2025 Luis For US#598530 10/01/2025 Geetham For US#593129 09/29/2025 Geetham For US#593120 09/26/2025 Geetham For US#593120 09/25/2025 Geetham For Agency NAC Commission Level Finding 09/18/2025 Geetham For US#592302 09/17/2025 Geetham For US#592302 09/15/2025 Geetham for US#592302 09/10/2025 Geetham for US#588453 09/09/2025 Geetham for US#588453 09/08/2025 Geetham for US#588453 09/02/2025 Geetham for US#588453 09/02/2025 Geetham - US#551263 08/20/2025 Muhammad - US#583716 08/18/2025 Geetham for US#551276 08/05/2025 Muhammad - US # 572031(Cancelled, new US#583716) 07/29/2025 Luis - Syncing NPN 07/18/2025 Geetham - Prod Issue fix for Active Upline 07/07/2025 German US 544100

formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK(TRIM({!CommissionLevelValue})), '', CASE( TRIM({!CommissionLevelValue}), '11 - Licensed Only','Licensed Only', '20 - DA200','Direct Agent 200', '30 - DA300','Direct Agent 300', '40 - DA400','Direct Agent 400', '45 - DA450','Direct Agent 450', '48 - DA480','Direct Agent 480', '50 - DA500','Direct Agent 500', '51 - DATSA','Direct Agent TSA', '60 - DA600','Direct Agent 600', '75 - DA750','Direct Agent 750', '80 - DA800','Direct Agent 800', '90 - DA1000','Direct Agent 1000', 'D1 - Broker Dealer 1','Broker Dealer 1', 'D2 - Broker Dealer 2','Broker Dealer 2', 'D3 - Broker Dealer 3','Broker Dealer 3', 'T4 - Preferred Plus Select','Preferred Plus Select', 'T3 - Preferred Plus','Preferred Plus', 'T2 - Preferred','Preferred', 'N9 - MGA Regular','MGA Regular', 'MGA Optional Plus','MGA Optional Plus', 'OP - MGA Optional Plus','MGA Optional Plus', 'N8 - MGA Optional','MGA Optional', 'N6 - GA Regular','General Agent Regular', 'N5 - GA Optional','General Agent Optional', 'N3 - WA Regular','Writing Agent Regular', 'E9 - WA Optional','Writing Agent Optional 9', 'E8 - WA Optional 8','Writing Agent Optional 8', 'E7 - WA Optional 7','Writing Agent Optional 7', 'E6 - WA Optional 6','Writing Agent Optional 6', 'E5 - WA Optional 5','Writing Agent Optional 5', 'E4 - WA Optional 4','Writing Agent Optional 4', 'E3 - WA Optional 3','Writing Agent Optional 3', 'E2 - WA Optional 2','Writing Agent Optional 2', 'E1 - WA Optional 1','Writing Agent Optional 1', 'EE - Broker','Broker', 'I6 - RM100','Regional Manager 100', 'X5 - Producer 75','Producer 75', 'X4 - Producer 70','Producer 70', 'X3 - Producer 65','Producer 65', 'X2 - Producer 60','Producer 60', 'X1 - Producer 55','Producer 55', 'XX - Producer 50','Producer 50', 'I1 - BDI Licensed Only','BDI Licensed Only', 'I1 - Licensed Only','IMC Licensed Only', 'I9 - RM115','Regional Manager 115', 'I8 - RM110','Regional Manager 110', 'I6 - Producer 100','Producer 100', 'X9 - Producer 95','Producer 95', 'X8 - Producer 90','Producer 90', 'X7 - Producer 85','Producer 85', 'IM - RM120','Regional Manager 120', 'X6 - Producer 80','Producer 80', 'I7 - RM105','Regional Manager 105', '' ) )
formulas.name: CommissionLevelFormula

formulas.expression: IF( {!AgencyCommissionLevel}, "Unknown", CASE( {!Commission_Level_NAC}, "T2 - Preferred", "Unknown", "T3 - Preferred Plus", "Unknown", "T4 - Preferred Plus Select", "Unknown", "I6 - Producer 100", "IMC Distribution", "I6 - RM100", "IMC Distribution", "I7 - RM105", "IMC Distribution", "I8 - RM110", "IMC Distribution", "I9 - RM115", "IMC Distribution", "IM - RM120", "IMC Distribution", "X1 - Producer 55", "IMC Distribution", "X2 - Producer 60", "IMC Distribution", "X3 - Producer 65", "IMC Distribution", "X4 - Producer 70", "IMC Distribution", "X5 - Producer 75", "IMC Distribution", "X6 - Producer 80", "IMC Distribution", "X7 - Producer 85", "IMC Distribution", "X8 - Producer 90", "IMC Distribution", "X9 - Producer 95", "IMC Distribution", "XX - Producer 50", "IMC Distribution", "I1 - Licensed Only", "IMC Distribution", "Managing General Agency" ) )
formulas.name: DistributionChannel_NAC

formulas.expression: IF({!AgencyCommissionLevelForNew},"Unknown",CASE({!Commission_Level_NAC_ForNew},"T2 - Preferred","Unknown","T3 - Preferred Plus","Unknown","T4 - Preferred Plus Select","Unknown","I6 - Producer 100","IMC Distribution","I6 - RM100","IMC Distribution","I7 - RM105","IMC Distribution","I8 - RM110","IMC Distribution","I9 - RM115","IMC Distribution","IM - RM120","IMC Distribution","X1 - Producer 55","IMC Distribution","X2 - Producer 60","IMC Distribution","X3 - Producer 65","IMC Distribution","X4 - Producer 70","IMC Distribution","X5 - Producer 75","IMC Distribution","X6 - Producer 80","IMC Distribution","X7 - Producer 85","IMC Distribution","X8 - Producer 90","IMC Distribution","X9 - Producer 95","IMC Distribution","XX - Producer 50","IMC Distribution","I1 - Licensed Only","IMC Distribution","Managing General Agency"))
formulas.name: DistributionChannel_NAC_ForNew

formulas.expression: IF( AND( ISBLANK({!Get_Producer_Record.ContactId}), NOT( ISBLANK( {!Get_Producer_Record.AccountId} ) ) ) , 'Account', IF( AND( ISBLANK({!Get_Producer_Record.AccountId}), NOT( ISBLANK( {!Get_Producer_Record.ContactId} ) ) ) , 'Producer', 'Producer' ) )
formulas.name: FlowTriggerObject

formulas.expression: IF( OR( AND({!ValidateCRD} = 'Y', {!Agent_is_an_Investment_Advisor_Representative} = TRUE), AND({!ValidateCRD} = 'N', {!OutputBDOversight} = 'No') ), 'Sammons Independent Annuity Group', 'Sammons Institutional Group' )
formulas.name: fxDistributionOwner

value.stringValue: Are you onboarding for a Business Entity or an Individual Agent?

fields.fieldText: ﻿The commission level for an agent cannot be the same or greater than the commission level of the upline.
fields.name: CommisionLevel_Error

fields.fieldText: You have completed the Non-Standard flow for {!Get_Contact_Record.Name}. Please review the details in the summary screen below. Once you're done, you may exit out of this screen.
fields.name: CompleteDT

fields.fieldText: Run BIG background check on agent.
fields.name: Run_BIG_background_check_on_agent

fields.fieldText: Please confirm or update the following Producer Contract details.
fields.name: Copy_2_of_dtContractInformation

fields.fieldText: Please confirm or update the following Producer Contract details.
fields.name: dtContractInformation

fields.fieldText: ﻿The commission level for an agent cannot be the same or greater than the commission level of the upline.
fields.name: Copy_1_of_CommisionLevel_Error

fields.fieldText: Warning: By proceeding with this workflow, you will be able to create an AdHoc Agent Code, however, existing Broker Dealer rules and logic will not be applied to any of the downstream record creation.
fields.name: AdhocDT

fields.fieldText: Which workflow path would you like to proceed with?
fields.name: SIG_or_SIAG

fields.fieldText: Uh oh! Looks like that NPN is already registered in the system to another agent record.
fields.name: dupesError

fields.fieldText: You do not meet the requirements to update the contract information.
fields.name: ErrorCantUpdateContractInfo

fields.fieldText: Is a BD providing oversight on Agent's business? If so, Broker Dealer CRD is required
fields.name: BD_Oversight

fields.fieldText: Agent is an Investment Advisor Representative
fields.name: Agent_is_an_Investment_Advisor_Representative

fields.fieldText: It looks like onboarding has already been submitted for this Agent Code. Please select the attributes that you would like to update (select all that apply):
fields.name: Update_Options

fields.fieldText: It looks like onboarding has already been submitted for this Agent Code. Please select the attributes that you would like to update (select all that apply):
fields.name: Update_Options_for_Account

fields.fieldText: If you do not wish to update any information related to this Agent Code, please exit out of this screen.
fields.name: finish

fields.fieldText: Please update or confirm the Upline
fields.name: Upline_Information

fields.fieldText: Please update or confirm the Upline
fields.name: Copy_1_of_Upline_Information
